title: NEWCORP LIMITED (13795) – Copy of Notice(PDF)
text:
NEWCORP LIMITED
(COMPANY NO. 13795)
NOTICE OF INTENTION TO BE REMOVED
FROM THE COMPAI{Y REGISTER
NO. ID
NOTICE OF 2017.
Section 143, Companies Act No.25 of 2012
NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN OF TIIE INTENTION OF
NEWCORP LIMITED TO BE REMOVED FROM THE
COMPANY REGISTER.
IF ANY PERSON OBJECTS TO THE REMOVAL OF THE
COMPANY FROM THE REGISTER THEN SUCH PERSON
MAY APPLY TO THE SIIPREME COURT AND LODGE A
NOTICE OF OBJECTION TO THE REMOVAL, NOT LATER
THAN 14 DAYS FROM PUBLICATION OF THIS NOTICE, ON
ONE OR MORE OF THE GROLTNDS SET OUT IN SECTION 144
(l) oF Tr{E COMPANTES ACT AND SHALL SERVE A COpy
OF SUCH NOTICE OF OBJECTION AT THE FOLLOWING
ADDRESS:
NEWCORP LIMITED
C/-GEORGE VASARIS & CO
PO BOX 166
PORT VILA
EMAIL: markhurlev@lawhousevanuatu.com
DATED at Port Vila this 20 day of February 2018.
